description:
As a development analyst, build a residential redevelopment probability model and use it to project housing development under a proposed upzoning scenario. Use /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, working in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/redevelopment_model.ipynb.

For each residential building (residential_units >= 1), compute three features: parcel_sqft (shape_area * 10.764 from the parcels table), zoning_headroom ((max_far * parcel_sqft - building_sqft) / (max_far * parcel_sqft), capped to [0, 1]) obtained via the zoning_for_parcels bridge table and the zoning table, and zone_median_income from the households table joined through buildings to parcels to zones. Exclude buildings where max_far <= 0 or building_sqft is missing, and drop rows with any NaN features. Flag buildings with year_built >= 2000 as recently_developed=1, else 0.

Train a logistic regression predicting recently_developed from parcel_sqft, zoning_headroom, and zone_median_income using a 70/30 train/test split with random_state=42. Report the AUC score. Then simulate a 50% upzoning scenario by increasing max_far by 50%, recomputing zoning_headroom, and predicting new redevelopment probabilities with the trained model. For each zone, compute expected_baseline_developments and expected_scenario_developments (sums of predicted probabilities) and development_uplift (scenario minus baseline).

Export /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/model_metrics.json containing auc_score, n_train, n_test, coefficients (feature name to value dict), and intercept. Export /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_development_impact.csv with columns zone_id, n_buildings, expected_baseline_developments, expected_scenario_developments, development_uplift, and zone_median_income. Save a scatter plot of baseline vs scenario expected developments per zone with a y=x reference line and points colored by development_uplift magnitude to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/scenario_comparison_chart.png.
